title: 東京大賞典の後に・三千年の願い

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey charges forward, carrying the wish
of 3,000 years of feng shui in her heart. The wish
to bring everyone happiness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey is crowned the champion. Those
who saw her run now truly believe that by
bringing one's surroundings into harmony, the
heavens will smile down upon them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, not to be outdone, Hokko Tarumae
declares that she'll once again face the challenges
of Dubai and grow even stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The heated battle is far from over. Copano
Rickey and I march forward, seeking to spread
even more happiness.
